calendar.matters:
Hearing On The Petition To Approve The Compromise Of An Adult With A Disability.
Off Calendar Jul-20-2010 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled this day for hearing on the Petition to Approve the Compromise of a Disputed Claim of an Adult with a Disability.
Dept. 218, Judge: Richard B. Ulmer, Jr., Clerk: Kevin Dougherty, CSR: Lois Jones, #3689.

Amir Sarreshtehdary, Esq. appeared for petitioner Silvai DePrey, the Guardian al Litem for Raymond Severance, a/k/a Raymond Calvin Severance.
Order waiving witness appearance at today's hearing was filed on June 28, 2010.

On the basis of evidence received, and good cause appearing, the Petition is granted and compromise is approved.

Settlement Amount - $7,762.55.
Attorney Fees 2,372.19.
Costs - $1,083.23.

The net balance of $4,307.13 shall be deposited into Alaska USA, Federal Credit Unino, P.O. Box 196613, Anchorage, AK in the name of Raymond Severance. Antoinette Horn shall continue to manage this account for Raymond's benefit with all disbursements thereform being made on his behalf.

Order Approving the Compromise of a Disputed Claim of an Adult with a Disability was submitted to and signed by the Court.

Hearing On The Petition To Approve The Compromise Of An Adult With A Disability.
Off Calendar Feb-01-2010 Off Calendar

Hearing On The Petition To Approve The Compromise Of An Adult With A Disability.
Off Calendar Dec-21-2009 Continued To Mar-02-10 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 218

MOTION And Notice Of Motion For Apportionment Proceeding And For An Order To Distribute Settlement Funds
Off Calendar Nov-03-2009 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled this day for Default Prove-Up Hearing.
Dept. 218, Judge: Andrew Y.S. Cheng, Clerk: Kevin Dougherty, #3689, CSR: Lois Jones, #3689.

Amir Sarreshtehdary, Esq., of Brayton Purcell, LLP, appeared for plaintiff.
No appearance by any of the wrongful death heirs.

The Court, having reviewed the moving papers and having considered the evidence, both oral and documentary, and good cause appearing, it is hereby Ordered that the following are entitled to distribution of all net settlement funds from the underlying survival and wrongful death action, in the following proportions:

Estate of Jack Severance - 0%
Silvia DePrey as wrongful death heir - 50%
Raymond Severance as wrongful death heir - 10%
Dora Croy as wrongful death heir - 10%
Sonia Perich as wrongful death heir - 10%
Roy Severance as wrongful death heir - 10%
Steven Severance as wrongful death heir - 0%
Sergio Serverance as wrongful death heir - 0%
Francisco Severance as wrongful death heir - 0%
Stacey Driveness as wrongful death heir - 3.33%
Richard Severance as wrongful death heir - 3.33%
Troy Severance as wrongful death heir - 3.33%

The law firm of Brayton Purcell LLP shall receive $1,083.00 as reasonable attorneys' fees and costs.

All future settlement funds shall be distributed in the percentages set forth above. The signature of Silvia DePrey shall be sufficient on all settlement documents for the purposes of settling all claims with any defendants in the underlying asbestos survival and wrongful death action.

Order Granting the Motion to Distribute Settlement Funds was submitted to and signed by the Court.

Hearing On The Motion To Apportion Settlement Funds.
